name: kumply
description: Compliance infrastructure for Avalanche — on-chain KYC/KYB attestations with eERC20 privacy and ICM cross-L1 verification
author: KUMPLY Team

scripts.seed:fuji: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/seed-fuji.ts --network fuji
scripts.deploy:fuji: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network fuji
scripts.deploy:mainnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network avalanche
scripts.verify:mainnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/verify-contracts.ts --network avalanche
